title: OfflineAuthRequest
description: Offline authentication request sent by the app to the station via BLE characteristic FFF3 (Write). Used when the phone is offline (Partial B strategy) and the station must validate the offline pass.

counter.description: Monotonically increasing counter for replay protection

sessionProof.description: Base64-encoded HMAC-SHA256 (exactly 44 chars) binding this request to the session key. Canonical construction: ble-handshake.md §4.1 — Base64(HMAC-SHA256(SessionKey, UTF8("OfflineAuthRequest") || UTF8(passId) || UTF8(decimal(counter)))). N1: the prior 64-char hex/4-input form is withdrawn.
